title: celtis bungeana
intro: Celtis bungeana, also known as the Chinese hackberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Celtis bungeana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
